title: Antarctica may give the world decades to prepare for rising seas - ScienceDaily
summary_full: Antarctica may give the world decades to prepare for rising seas  ScienceDailyA giant Antarctic glacier is on the brink: How Thwaites could change coastlines worldwide  YnetnewsA study that ran 800,000 years of simulations raised a red flag: the gigantic ice sheet of West Antarctica could collapse with just an additional 0.25°C of ocean warming, and the melting would raise sea levels by up to 4 meters, reshaping the planet's coastline.  CPG Click Oil and Gas
